title: Gently Smoky Turkish Wild Mushrooms Roast
description: A light and smoky Turkish dish featuring wild mushrooms, perfect for a tamasic-friendly meal

ingredients.name: wild mushrooms
ingredients.notes: such as chanterelle or oyster mushrooms

instructions: Preheat the oven to 425 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, whisk together olive oil, smoked paprika, garlic powder, salt, and black pepper.
Add the wild mushrooms to the bowl and toss to coat with the smoky mixture.
Spread the mushrooms in a single layer on a baking sheet.
Roast the mushrooms in the preheated oven for 20 minutes, or until they release their liquid and start to brown.
Remove the mushrooms from the oven and drizzle with lemon juice.
Sprinkle chopped fresh parsley over the mushrooms and toss to combine.
Return the mushrooms to the oven and roast for an additional 5 minutes, or until they are tender and lightly browned.
